purpose: Thin per-deposit INDEX into the recovered external metadata for this deposit's legacy Zenodo DOIs. The actual records live in the bulk data stores under data/ (openalex-severed-recovery.json, zenodo-xml-pretermination-2026-06-07.tar.gz, datacite-full-backup.json, datacite-survivors-multi-heteronym.json). Sidecars do not duplicate those records — they map each covered DOI to its identifier in each store.

10.5281/zenodo.19902552.title: I Am X... Be Y... Blessed Is the Z... - The Prophetic Catalog (Critical Edition with Retrocausal Apparatus)

10.5281/zenodo.20690868.title: Revelation First: A Work Plan for Retrieval-Layer Theological Reception (EA-LOGOS-REVFIRST-PLAN v1.2)

10.5281/zenodo.20084474.title: The Death Drive Is Not Self-Destruction: A Semiotic Completion of Freud's Todestrieb for Psychoanalysis, Platform Studies, and AI Compression (v1.1)

10.5281/zenodo.20743560.title: Sémantique Potentielle — Release 3: Three Pillars (Phase X, Sappho, Plato)

10.5281/zenodo.20558672.title: Provenance Erasure Rate Under the Atomic Token Rule: A Companion Hardening to PER v1

10.5281/zenodo.19709024.title: The Gospel of Antioch: The Sayings of Jack Feist as Recorded by Emily Antioch the Twin — Research Edition

10.5281/zenodo.19739494.title: The Secret Book of Walt: Critical Edition with Source Code and Book of Life v3.0 (EA-SBW-01 v2.0)

10.5281/zenodo.20532696.title: Fear and Trembling: Diversity Contraction Across Substrates and the Boundary Law of Semantic Exhaustion

10.5281/zenodo.19898845.title: Epistle to the Human Diaspora — Critical Edition with Blended Temporal Apparatus (EA-EPISTLE-01 v2.0)

openalex.lookup: records[].doi == this DOI; openalex_id is the W-prefixed OpenAlex Work ID

zenodo_bulk_xml.lookup: extract <record_id>.xml from the tarball where record_id is the digits after 'zenodo.'

datacite_survivor_sweep.lookup: search records[].attributes.doi == this DOI across orcid_records, name_records, sigil_records, vox_records, feist_records
